name: TPC Sawgrass - Stadium Course
notes: Home of THE PLAYERS Championship. Premier corporate outing venue in NE Florida with dedicated events team.

name: TPC Tampa Bay
notes: High-volume charity and corporate event host in Tampa metro. Accessible public TPC facility.

name: Trump National Doral - Blue Monster
notes: Iconic Miami resort with 4 courses. Major corporate outing and charity gala destination.

name: PGA National Resort - The Champion
notes: Home of Honda Classic. 5 courses, dedicated group events coordinator. Palm Beach corporate market.

name: Streamsong Resort - Red Course
notes: Top-ranked destination resort with 3 courses. Popular for corporate retreats and buddy trips.

name: Innisbrook Resort - Copperhead Course
notes: Home of Valspar Championship. 4 courses, huge corporate outing and charity event business.

name: Arnold Palmer's Bay Hill Club & Lodge
notes: Home of Arnold Palmer Invitational. Strong charity event ties through Arnie's Army foundation.

name: Grand Cypress Golf Club
notes: 45 holes near Disney. Major corporate outing destination for Orlando convention market.

name: World Golf Village - King & Bear
notes: Home of World Golf Hall of Fame. Two public courses ideal for charity scrambles and group events.

name: Sawgrass Country Club
notes: Premier private club in Ponte Vedra. Active member-guest tournament schedule.

name: Reunion Resort - Watson Course
notes: 3 signature courses (Watson, Nicklaus, Palmer). Disney-area resort popular for corporate groups.

name: Waldorf Astoria Golf Club
notes: Rees Jones design near Disney. Upscale corporate outing venue tied to Waldorf brand.

name: Tiburon Golf Club - Gold Course
notes: Home of LPGA CME Group Tour Championship. Premium Naples corporate event venue.

name: Hammock Beach Resort - Ocean Course
notes: Jack Nicklaus ocean course. Popular for corporate retreats and charity events on the coast.

name: ChampionsGate Golf Club
notes: Greg Norman 36-hole facility near Disney. High-volume charity scramble and corporate outing host.

name: Orange County National Golf Center
notes: 36 holes, massive practice facility. One of Central FL's busiest charity scramble venues.

name: Shingle Creek Golf Club
notes: Adjacent to convention center hotels. Prime Orlando corporate outing location.

name: Weston Hills Country Club
notes: Semi-private 36-hole facility in Broward County. Active charity event schedule.

name: Jacaranda Golf Club
notes: 36-hole municipal in Broward. Highest volume charity scramble host in South FL due to pricing.

name: Crandon Golf at Key Biscayne
notes: Former Senior PGA Tour venue. Miami's premier public course for charity outings.

name: Biltmore Golf Course
notes: Historic Coral Gables landmark. Upscale corporate event destination in Miami.

name: Doral Golf Resort - Silver Fox
notes: Only golf course on Miami Beach. Popular charity event venue due to unique location.

name: Inverrary Country Club
notes: Former PGA Tour host. Affordable semi-private facility popular for Broward charity scrambles.

name: Boca Raton Resort - Resort Course
notes: Iconic Palm Beach County resort. Two courses, strong corporate and charity event business.

name: BallenIsles Country Club
notes: 54 holes, 3 courses. Very active member-guest tournament calendar in Palm Beach.

name: Breakers Rees Jones Course
notes: Legendary Palm Beach resort. Premium corporate outing and charity gala golf venue.

name: Old Palm Golf Club
notes: Ultra-exclusive Raymond Floyd design. Active member-guest events.

name: Copperleaf Golf Club
notes: Private club in SW FL with strong member-guest tournament tradition.

name: Naples Beach Hotel Golf Club
notes: Newly renovated Naples resort. Corporate retreat and charity outing destination in SW FL.

name: Lely Resort Golf & Country Club

name: Pelican's Nest Golf Club
notes: Tom Fazio 36-hole semi-private in SW FL. Regular charity event host.

name: Tampa Palms Golf & Country Club
notes: Semi-private club accessible for Tampa-area charity scrambles and corporate outings.

name: Westchase Golf Club
notes: Popular Tampa public course. High charity scramble volume due to competitive pricing.

name: Cove Cay Golf Club

name: Copperhead Course at Innisbrook
notes: Historic Donald Ross design. Prestigious member-guest tournaments in Tampa Bay area.

name: Plantation Bay Golf & Country Club
notes: 45 holes across 3 courses in Volusia County. Active member-guest tournament schedule.

name: LPGA International
notes: Two Rees Jones/Arthur Hills courses. LPGA brand draws strong charity event interest.

name: Falcon's Fire Golf Club

name: MetroWest Golf Club

notes: Historic oceanfront resort with 36 holes. NE FL corporate retreat and member-guest destination.

name: Deerwood Country Club
notes: Exclusive Jax private club with active member-guest tournament calendar.

notes: Upscale Jax private club. Waterfront setting popular for member-guest and charity events.

name: Heritage Oaks Golf Club

name: Misty Creek Country Club
notes: Semi-private Sarasota facility accessible for charity scramble bookings.

name: Turnberry Isle Resort - Soffer Course
notes: Direct contact - Sean Olson. JW Marriott Turnberry Isle, two championship courses. Corporate events and member-guest tournaments.
